title: QA_BELL_CHSH_CERT
description: Certifies the '8|N theorem': the QA cosine correlator E_N(s,t)=cos(2π(s-t)/N) achieves the CHSH Tsirelson bound |S|=2√2 if and only if 8 divides N. Locks in the N-sweep results from qa_chsh_bell_test.py.

cert_id.description: Human-readable identifier for this certificate instance.

model_note.description: Note on the physical interpretation of the correlator model.

n_sweep.description: Results of the N-sweep: for each N, whether 8|N, the max |S| achieved, and whether it equals the Tsirelson bound.

N.description: Cycle length of the QA N-gon.

max_abs_S.description: Maximum |S| found over all settings (a, a', b, b') ∈ {0,...,N-1}^4.

hit_tsirelson.description: True if max_abs_S is within 1e-6 of 2√2.

optimal_settings.description: Optional: (a, a', b, b') settings achieving max_abs_S.

model_assessment.description: Validity assessment of the correlator model.

model_valid.description: True if the model produces valid, reproducible results.

model_not_physically_realizable.description: True if the model is not a valid physical model (e.g. unconstrained quantum correlators). Must be False for the CHSH cosine correlator, which IS a valid deterministic LHV model.

notes.description: Notes on model validity and physical interpretation.

canonical_sha256.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys, no spaces) with this field zeroed to 64 zeros.
